tasks.label: ⬆️ Up Frontend
tasks.detail: Start up the local docker dev environment

tasks.label: 🪵 Log Frontend
tasks.detail: Show the logs for the frontend

tasks.label: ✅ Test Frontend
tasks.detail: Run all unit tests for Frontend
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml run --build --rm 'fcp-sfd-frontend'

tasks.label: ‼️ Only Test Frontend
tasks.detail: Run the currently selected test file for frontend
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml run --rm fcp-sfd-frontend npx vitest run ${relativeFile}

tasks.label: Watch Test Frontend
tasks.detail: Run the test watcher for frontend
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.watch.yaml run --build --rm 'fcp-sfd-frontend'

tasks.label: 🧹 Lint Fix
tasks.detail: Automatically fix linting issues in the codebase

tasks.label: 🛠️ Clean Frontend
tasks.detail: Will drop the containers, remove related images and volumes
tasks.command: docker compose down --rmi local -v; echo "All done! 🎉"

tasks.label: 🥸 DefraID: Enable stub
tasks.detail: Switch frontend to use DefraID stub and recreate containers
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --force-recreate && echo "DefraID stub enabled – containers restarted 🎉"

tasks.label: 🤡 DefraID: Disable stub
tasks.detail: Switch frontend back to real DefraID and restart containers
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --force-recreate && echo "DefraID stub disabled – containers restarted 🎉"

tasks.label: 🥸🧪 Run with local stubs (DefraID + DAL)
tasks.detail: Uses local stub services via compose.stub.yaml
tasks.command: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.override.yaml -f compose.stub.yaml up -d --build --force-recreate && echo "Stub mode enabled – containers restarted 🎉"
